zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Arnsberg於1212年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格時，她的父親Gottfried II. von Arnsberg55歲，母親Agnes von Rüdenberg25歲。她和Bernhard III. zur Lippe至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1245年1月19日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 利普代特莫爾德享年33歲，埋葬在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫阿斯格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Arnsberg于1212年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格时，她的父亲Gottfried II. von Arnsberg55岁，母亲Agnes von Rüdenberg25岁。她和Bernhard III. zur Lippe至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1245年1月19日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 利普代特莫爾德享年33岁，埋葬在海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫阿斯格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnsberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Swedish (of German origin): habitational name from a place called as ‘eagle's mountain’ (see   Arend   and   Berg  ), probably Ahrensberg in Mecklenburg. Compare   Darensbourg  .

variants.name: Arend
meanings: German: from the personal name Arend of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule’.

variants.name: Darensbourg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Aurore, Camile, Pierre.

Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of German Arensberg . It is formed with the French preposition de ‘from’, spelled d' before a vowel. This surname is found mainly among African Americans.

History: The progenitor of many of the Darensbourgs was Karl Friedrich Arensberg, a German born in Stettin in Pomerania (today Szczecin in Poland), who arrived in LA in 1721. By 1724, Darensbourg, as he came to be known, was de facto leader of the German colony in LA.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Arnsberg was born in 1212, in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, was 55 and her mother, Agnes von Rüdenberg, was 25. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Bernhard III. zur Lippe. She died on 19 January 1245, in Detmold, Lippe, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 33, and was buried in Arnsberg, Westphalia, Prussia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Arnsberg est née en 1212, à Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Rüdenberg, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Bernhard III. zur Lippe. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1245, à Detmold, Kreis Lippe, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Arnsberg 1212 in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gottfried II. von Arnsberg 55 und ihre Mutter Agnes von Rüdenberg 25. Sie hatte mit Bernhard III. zur Lippe mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Januar 1245 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Detmold, Kreis Lippe, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Arnsberg è nata il nel 1212 nel Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Agnes von Rüdenberg, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Bernhard III. zur Lippe. Morì il 19 gennaio 1245, nel Detmold, Kreis Lippe, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Arnsbergが1212年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグで生まれた時，父Gottfried II. von Arnsbergは55歳，母Agnes von Rüdenbergは25歳であった。彼女はBernhard III. zur Lippeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1245年1月19日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス リップデトモルドで33歳で死去し，プレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンアルンスバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Arnsberg(이)가 1212년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gottfried II. von Arnsberg(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes von Rüdenberg(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Bernhard III. zur Lippe(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1245년 1월 19일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 크레이스 리프 데트모드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 플레우ss 플로빈츠 웨스트파렌 아른스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Arnsberg nasceu em 1212, em Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Rüdenberg, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Bernhard III. zur Lippe. Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1245, em Detmold, Kreis Lippe, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Arnsberg родилась в 1212 г. в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Gottfried II. von Arnsberg было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Rüdenberg, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Bernhard III. zur Lippe. Она умерла 19 января 1245 г. в местности детмолд, крис липп, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности арнсбирг, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie von Arnsberg nació en 1212, en Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Gottfried II. von Arnsberg, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Agnes von Rüdenberg, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Bernhard III. zur Lippe. Murió el 19 de enero de 1245, en Detmold, Kreis Lippe, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Arnsberg, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen.
